name: Special Dough for Tourtieres
recipeIngredient: 1 pound pure lard, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Measure 1 1/3 cups of the lard and incorporate it into the flour mixture until the dough is crumbly (mealy).
3. Dissolve the remaining lard in the hot water.
4. Add the lemon juice or vinegar and beaten egg to the lard-water mixture.
5. Mix these liquids into the flour mixture until a dough forms that does not stick to the sides of the bowl.
6. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead for about 1 minute, or until all the flour is incorporated.
7. Wrap the dough in waxed paper and refrigerate for 1 to 12 hours. The dough will be very easy to roll after chilling.
